title: The large cores of dark matter and globular clusters in AS1063. Possible evidence of self-interacting dark matter. Or not
summary: Deep JWST images of AS1063 reveals tens of thousands of globular clusters in the galaxy cluster AS1063. When compared with the lensing model based on the same JWST data, the distribution of globular clusters traces closely the distribution of lensing mass (mostly composed of dark matter). Interestingly, both the distributions of dark matter and globular clusters have large central cores. However the size of the core in the distribution of globular clusters is about half the size the core of the dark matter distribution. We argue that the standard cold dark matter and fuzzy dark matter models struggle to explain these large cores. Meanwhile, the self interacting dark matter with a velocity dependent cross section, combined with core stalling, offers a natural explanation to the existence of these cores if $σ_{\rm SI}\approx 0.3$ cm$^2$ g$^{-1}$ for galaxy cluster halos. But we also discuss how the lack of hydrodynamical N-body simulations capable of resolving globular clusters in galaxy cluster scale halos, hinders the possibility of ruling out the standard non-collisional dark matter scenario. Future high-resolution hydrodynamical simulations of galaxy clusters, with several trillion particles, and containing over a hundred thousand globular clusters, can provide the insight needed to transform the epistemic nature of dark matter into an ontological one

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现AS1063星系团中球状星团分布与暗物质分布相似但核心尺寸不同，自相互作用暗物质模型能更好解释这一现象，但需要更高分辨率模拟验证
AI.motivation: 研究AS1063星系团中球状星团分布与暗物质分布的关系，探索暗物质性质，特别是核心尺寸差异对暗物质模型的约束
AI.method: 使用JWST深度成像观测AS1063星系团，分析数万个球状星团的分布，并与基于相同JWST数据的引力透镜模型（主要反映暗物质分布）进行比较
AI.result: 球状星团分布与暗物质分布紧密相关，但球状星团分布的核心尺寸约为暗物质核心尺寸的一半；标准冷暗物质和模糊暗物质模型难以解释这种大核心，而自相互作用暗物质模型（σ_SI≈0.3 cm² g⁻¹）结合核心停滞机制能自然解释这一现象
AI.conclusion: 自相互作用暗物质模型能更好解释观测到的核心尺寸差异，但缺乏能解析星系团尺度晕中球状星团的高分辨率流体动力学N体模拟，限制了排除标准非碰撞暗物质场景的可能性；未来万亿粒子级的高分辨率模拟将有助于将暗物质的认识从认识论层面提升到本体论层面

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST对AS1063的深度图像揭示了该星系团中数以万计的球状星团。当与基于相同JWST数据的透镜模型进行比较时，球状星团的分布与透镜质量（主要由暗物质组成）的分布紧密吻合。有趣的是，暗物质和球状星团的分布都具有大的中心核。然而，球状星团分布的核心尺寸约为暗物质分布核心尺寸的一半。我们认为，标准冷暗物质和模糊暗物质模型难以解释这些大核心。同时，具有速度依赖截面的自相互作用暗物质，结合核心停滞效应，为这些核心的存在提供了自然的解释，前提是对于星系团晕，$σ_{\rm SI}\approx 0.3$ cm$^2$ g$^{-1}$。但我们也讨论了缺乏能够解析星系团尺度晕中球状星团的流体动力学N体模拟，如何阻碍了排除标准非碰撞暗物质场景的可能性。未来对星系团的高分辨率流体动力学模拟，包含数万亿粒子和超过十万个球状星团，将提供所需的洞察力，将暗物质的认识论本质转化为本体论本质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，自相互作用暗物质模型能更好解释观测到的核心尺寸差异，但缺乏能解析星系团尺度晕中球状星团的高分辨率流体动力学N体模拟，限制了排除标准非碰撞暗物质场景的可能性；未来万亿粒子级的高分辨率模拟将有助于将暗物质的认识从认识论层面提升到本体论层面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison of the lensing mass and GC profiles with analytical models. The dark blue (lensing mass) and black (GCs) lines are from paper-I and paper-II respectively. For the GC, the profile is corrected for background contamination. The solid black curve is re-scaled by a factor 4 to visually match the lensing profile. The green curve is an NFW profile that matches the lensing profile in the region constrained by lensing (blue vertical dotted lines). The green line is a PIEMD profile fitting the lensing mass from alternative lens models (see text). The red line is a Burkert profile fitting the lensing mass profile while the orange line is a different Burkert profile fitting the distribution of GCs. The dashed-black is the number density of the brightest GCs in the full sample obtained after increasing the detection threshold by one order of magnitude (and containing 4061 GCs, or one seventh the total number in the full catalog). The dashed black line includes the same factor 4 as the black solid line. Finally, the dashed orange line is the same Burkert profile shown as a solid-orange line with \(r_{b}=70\) kpc but divided by a factor seven.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：透镜质量与球状星团（GC）轮廓与分析模型的比较。深蓝色（透镜质量）和黑色（GC）线分别来自论文I和论文II。对于GC，轮廓已校正背景污染。黑色实线曲线按因子4重新缩放，以在视觉上匹配透镜轮廓。绿色曲线是NFW轮廓，在透镜约束区域（蓝色垂直虚线）内匹配透镜轮廓。绿色线是拟合替代透镜模型透镜质量的PIEMD轮廓（见正文）。红色线是拟合透镜质量轮廓的Burkert轮廓，而橙色线是拟合GC分布的不同Burkert轮廓。黑色虚线是完整样本中最亮GC的数密度，通过将检测阈值提高一个数量级获得（包含4061个GC，即完整目录总数的七分之一）。黑色虚线包含与黑色实线相同的因子4。最后，橙色虚线是与橙色实线相同的Burkert轮廓，其中\(r_{b}=70\) kpc，但除以因子七。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Central \(3\) region of AS1063 (filtered). The image is obtained after two high-pass filters are applied to the F090W, F115W, F150W and F200W images (see Diego et al. , 2026b , for details) , and combining the four filtered images into a single one. Many GCs can be seen in the image with an almost uniform number density. The yellow and cyan solid lines are the light contours in the raw F356W image at \(50\%\) and \(25\%\) , respectively, of the maximum intensity in the center. The yellow and cyan dashed curves are ellipses fitting the corresponding solid lines. The small yellow and cyan circles near the bright central source are the corresponding centers of the two ellipses. The bright source near the center is at the position of the peak emission in the raw images and it is likely the central SMBH.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：AS1063的中心\(3\)区域（滤波后）。该图像是通过对F090W、F115W、F150W和F200W图像应用两个高通滤波器（详见Diego等人，2026b），并将四个滤波图像合并为一个而获得的。图像中可以看到许多GC，其数密度几乎均匀。黄色和青色实线是原始F356W图像中分别位于中心最大强度\(50\%\)和\(25\%\)处的光轮廓。黄色和青色虚线是拟合相应实线的椭圆。靠近明亮中心源的小黄色和青色圆圈是两个椭圆的对应中心。靠近中心的明亮源位于原始图像中峰值发射的位置，很可能是中心超大质量黑洞（SMBH）。

title: The Carousel Lens II: Cosmological Constraints with GIGA-Lens
summary: The nature of dark matter and dark energy are among the central questions in cosmology. Strong gravitational lenses with multiple source planes provide a geometric probe of cosmology: the ratio of deflection angles at different redshifts depends only on angular-diameter distances, constraining the matter density $Ω_m$ and the dark energy equation of state $w$. However, constraints from this technique have historically lagged behind those from the CMB, SNe Ia, and BAO. In this work, we present new cosmological constraints from the Carousel Lens, a cluster-scale lens with more than 40 extended images from 11 spectroscopically confirmed sources. Its relaxed core and rich set of extended images behind the main halo make it particularly suitable for cosmological inference. Using the GIGA-Lens pipeline, we construct a pixel-level lens model including six HST-detected sources and four mass components. From this model, we obtain $w$CDM constraints of $Ω_m = 0.34^{+0.16}_{-0.13}$ and $w = -1.31^{+0.35}_{-0.32}$ from the Carousel Lens alone, accounting for both statistical and systematic uncertainties. We further project that including four additional known higher-redshift sources, assuming similar fractional uncertainties, could improve the constraining power by ~80%, bringing the precision close to that of the CMB and SNe Ia. For an evolving dark energy model ($w_0w_a$CDM), the Carousel Lens alone yields constraints comparable to the CMB, providing an independent and complementary probe alongside SN Ia and BAO. While currently systematic uncertainties dominate, which we quantify through simulations, our results demonstrate that relaxed multi-source-plane cluster lenses can deliver competitive cosmological constraints. Further improvements are expected from reductions in systematics and from incorporating higher-redshift sources (known and new) with high-resolution imaging.

AI.tldr: 利用Carousel Lens（一个包含11个光谱确认源、40多个延伸图像的星系团透镜）作为宇宙学探针，通过引力透镜几何效应约束暗物质密度Ω_m和暗能量状态方程w，获得与CMB、超新星等传统方法可比拟的宇宙学约束。
AI.motivation: 暗物质和暗能量的本质是宇宙学的核心问题。多源平面强引力透镜提供了一种几何宇宙学探针：不同红移处的偏折角之比仅依赖于角直径距离，可以约束物质密度Ω_m和暗能量状态方程w。然而，该技术的历史约束一直落后于CMB、Ia型超新星和BAO等传统方法。
AI.method: 使用Carousel Lens（一个星系团尺度透镜，包含11个光谱确认源和40多个延伸图像），利用其松弛的核心和丰富的延伸图像集。采用GIGA-Lens管线构建像素级透镜模型，包括6个HST探测源和4个质量成分。通过模拟量化统计和系统不确定性。
AI.result: 从Carousel Lens单独获得wCDM约束：Ω_m = 0.34^{+0.16}_{-0.13}，w = -1.31^{+0.35}_{-0.32}。对于演化的暗能量模型(w_0w_aCDM)，Carousel Lens单独给出的约束与CMB相当。预计加入4个已知更高红移源可将约束能力提高约80%，接近CMB和超新星的精度。
AI.conclusion: 松弛的多源平面星系团透镜能够提供有竞争力的宇宙学约束，作为超新星和BAO的独立互补探针。虽然目前系统不确定性占主导，但通过减少系统误差和纳入更高红移源的高分辨率成像，有望进一步改进约束能力。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 暗物质和暗能量的本质是宇宙学中的核心问题之一。具有多个源平面的强引力透镜提供了宇宙学的几何探针：不同红移处的偏折角之比仅取决于角直径距离，从而约束物质密度 $Ω_m$ 和暗能量状态方程 $w$。然而，历史上该技术给出的约束落后于CMB、Ia型超新星和重子声学振荡。本文展示了来自Carousel透镜的新宇宙学约束，该透镜是一个星系团尺度透镜，包含来自11个光谱确认源的超过40个延展像。其松弛的核和主晕后方丰富的延展像使其特别适合宇宙学推断。利用GIGA-Lens流程，我们构建了一个像素级透镜模型，包含六个HST探测到的源和四个质量分量。基于该模型，仅从Carousel透镜我们得到 $w$CDM约束 $Ω_m = 0.34^{+0.16}_{-0.13}$ 和 $w = -1.31^{+0.35}_{-0.32}$，同时考虑了统计和系统不确定性。我们进一步预测，纳入四个已知的更高红移源（假设类似的不确定性分数）可将约束能力提高约80%，使精度接近CMB和Ia型超新星。对于演化暗能量模型（$w_0w_a$CDM），仅Carousel透镜就能给出与CMB相当的约束，为SN Ia和BAO提供了独立且互补的探针。虽然目前系统不确定性占主导（我们通过模拟量化了这一点），但我们的结果表明，松弛的多源平面星系团透镜能够提供有竞争力的宇宙学约束。通过减少系统误差以及纳入更高红移源（已知和新发现的）的高分辨率成像，有望进一步改进。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结：松弛的多源平面星系团透镜能够提供有竞争力的宇宙学约束，作为超新星和BAO的独立互补探针。虽然目前系统不确定性占主导，但通过减少系统误差和纳入更高红移源的高分辨率成像，有望进一步改进约束能力。

title: How Bursty is Star Formation at z>5?
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, one table. Accepted for publication by ApJ
summary:
Motivated by observational evidence from JWST and theoretical results from cosmological simulations, we use a simple parametric, phenomenological model to test to what extent bursty star formation with standard Initial Mass Function, no continuous star formation, no mergers, \mr{and no dust} can account for the observed properties in the $M_{UV}$ vs $M_*$ plane of galaxies at redshifts $z>5$. We find that the simplest model that fits the data has a quiescence period between bursts $Δt \sim 100$~Myrs and the stellar mass in each galaxy grows linearly as a function of time from $z=12$ to $z=5$ (i.e., repeated bursts in each galaxy produce approximately equal mass in stars). The distribution of burst masses across different galaxies follows a power-law $dN/dM_* \propto M_*^α$ with slope $α\sim -2$.
  At $z>9-10$ the observed galaxy population typically had only one or two bursts of stars formation, hence the observed stellar masses at these redshifts (reaching $M_* \sim 10^{10}$~M$_\odot$), roughly represent the distribution of masses formed in one burst.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用简单的参数化模型测试爆发式恒星形成能否解释高红移星系观测特征，发现最佳模型需要约100Myr的爆发间隔，且恒星质量随时间线性增长，爆发质量分布符合幂律。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 受JWST观测证据和宇宙学模拟理论结果的启发，我们使用一个简单的参数化现象学模型来检验，在标准初始质量函数、无连续恒星形成、无并合、无尘埃的条件下，爆发式恒星形成在多大程度上能够解释红移z>5星系在M_UV vs M_*平面上的观测性质。我们发现，拟合数据的最简单模型要求爆发之间的静默期Δt ∼ 100 Myr，并且每个星系的恒星质量从z=12到z=5随时间线性增长（即每个星系中的重复爆发产生大致相等的恒星质量）。不同星系间爆发质量的分布遵循幂律dN/dM_* ∝ M_*^α，斜率α∼ -2。在z>9-10时，观测到的星系群通常只经历了一次或两次恒星形成爆发，因此这些红移处观测到的恒星质量（达到M_* ∼ 10^10 M_⊙）大致代表了单次爆发中形成的质量分布。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，简单的爆发式恒星形成模型能够解释高红移星系的观测特征，表明早期宇宙中星系的恒星形成可能主要通过离散的爆发事件实现，而非连续过程。

title: Euclid preparation. Impact of galaxy intrinsic alignment modelling choices on Euclid 3x2pt cosmology
summary: The Euclid galaxy survey will provide unprecedented constraints on cosmology, but achieving unbiased results will require an optimal characterisation and mitigation of systematic effects. Among these, the intrinsic alignments (IA) of galaxies are one of the dominant contaminants of the weak lensing (WL) and galaxy-galaxy lensing (GGL) probes. In this work, we assess IA modelling choices for Euclid DR1 3x2pt analyses by comparing the performance of the two most commonly used IA models, nonlinear alignment (NLA) and tidal alignment tidal torquing (TATT), along with several variations. Our analyses combine three perspectives: i) the constraining power on the IA and cosmological parameters for each IA model, ii) the bias that results when the IA analysis model differs from the model used to generate the synthetic data vector, and iii) the degeneracies between IA and photometric redshift (photo-z) nuisance parameters. Among the IA models analysed, the redshift-dependent TATT model (zTATT) provides the most flexible description of IA, with a similar constraining power compared to simpler IA models, making it a well-motivated choice for Euclid DR1 3x2pt analyses.

AI.tldr: 评估Euclid DR1 3x2pt分析中不同星系本征排列(IA)模型的性能，推荐使用红移依赖的潮汐排列潮汐扭矩(zTATT)模型
AI.motivation: Euclid星系巡天将提供前所未有的宇宙学约束，但需要优化系统效应的表征和缓解。星系本征排列(IA)是弱引力透镜(WL)和星系-星系透镜(GGL)探测的主要污染源之一，需要评估不同IA模型的选择。
AI.method: 比较两种最常用的IA模型：非线性排列(NLA)和潮汐排列潮汐扭矩(TATT)及其变体。分析结合三个视角：1)每个IA模型对IA和宇宙学参数的约束能力；2)当IA分析模型与生成合成数据向量所用模型不同时产生的偏差；3)IA与光度红移(photo-z)冗余参数之间的简并性。
AI.result: 在分析的IA模型中，红移依赖的TATT模型(zTATT)提供了最灵活的IA描述，与更简单的IA模型相比具有相似的约束能力。
AI.conclusion: 红移依赖的TATT模型(zTATT)是Euclid DR1 3x2pt分析的一个有充分动机的选择，因为它能灵活描述IA现象且不损失约束能力。

title: Stellar microlensing as a probe of Primordial Black Holes: status and prospects
summary: Stellar microlensing is a powerful tool for probing dark matter in the form of planetary and stellar mass compact objects (COs), in particular primordial black holes (PBHs). Under standard assumptions, current observations exclude COs in the mass range $10^{-11} \lesssim M/M_{\odot} \lesssim 10^{4}$ making up all of the dark matter. We provide an overview, aimed at theorists working on PBHs, of the history, theory, observational status, and future prospects of the field.

figures.caption_zh: 图2：放大因子 \(A\) （方程(5)）作为 \(2t/\hat{t}\) 的函数，对应 \(u_{min}=b_{min}/R_{E}=0.25,0.5\) 和 \(1.0\) （从上到下）。水平虚线黑线表示微引力透镜事件的阈值 \(A_{T}=1.34\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The differential event rate, \({d}\Gamma/{d}\hat{t}\) , as a function of Einstein diameter crossing time, \(\hat{t}\) , for a standard halo (see text for details) composed entirely, \(f=1\) , of COs with mass \(M=1M_{\odot}\) as given by Eq. ( 14 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：微分事件率 \({d}\Gamma/{d}\hat{t}\) 作为爱因斯坦直径穿越时间 \(\hat{t}\) 的函数，针对完全由质量 \(M=1M_{\odot}\) 的致密天体组成（\(f=1\)）的标准晕（详见正文），由方程(14)给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Constraints on the CO mass, \(M\) , and MW halo fraction, \(f\) , at 95% confidence, assuming all CO have the same mass. The solid lines denote exclusion limits, while the dot-dashed black line shows the envelope of the tightest constraint for each value of \(M\) . The dashed lines show allowed regions of parameter space. The exclusion limits are from EROS (’E’) Tisserand et al. ( 2007 ) (yellow), MACHO long timescale (’M-long’) Allsman et al. ( 2001 ) (red), EROS plus MACHO long timescale (’E+M’) Blaineau et al. ( 2022 ) (orange), OGLE Mróz et al. ( 2024 ) and OGLE high cadence (’OGLE-hc’) Mróz et al. ( 2024 ) (blue), and Kepler (’K’) Griest et al. ( 2014 ) (green). The purple lines are from high cadence observations of M31 using the Subaru-HSC. ’HSC19’ shows the original exclusion limit Niikura et al. ( 2019 ) as calculated in Ref. Croon et al. ( 2020 ) , while ’HSC26’ shows the exclusion limit from the latest analysis, under the assumption that none of the events observed are due to CO in the MW halo. The dashed line shows the allowed parameter values assuming that the 4 ’secure’ high-significance events are due to CO in the MW halo. The dashed red line shows the allowed parameter values from the 13 set A events in the final 5.7 year MACHO data set, as published in Ref. Alcock et al. ( 2000 ) . Subsequent observations indicate that some of these events are not microlensing (see Sec. 3.2 and Refs. Tisserand et al. ( 2007 ); Mróz et al. ( 2025 ) for discussion). The dotted blue line, labeled ’OGLE?’, shows the parameter values found assuming that the ultra-short duration events observed towards the Galactic bulge by OGLE are due to COs in the MW halo Niikura et al. ( 2019 ) . This plot was made using a modified version of Kavanagh’s PBHBounds Kavanagh .

title: Chiral gravitational waves from multi-phase magnetogenesis
summary: Cosmological vector fields are central to many early-Universe phenomena, including inflationary dynamics, primordial magnetogenesis, and dark-matter scenarios. However, constructing models able to generate cosmological magnetic fields while avoiding strong coupling, backreaction, and cosmic microwave background constraints remains challenging. We study a novel mechanism in which brief non--slow-roll phases during inflation amplify primordial magnetic fields at small scales, while maintaining theoretical consistency and observational viability. We incorporate parity-violating interactions in the vector sector and demonstrate, for the first time in a non--slow-roll framework, that chirality can significantly boost magnetic-field amplitudes and imprint distinctive polarization-dependent spectral features. We complement detailed numerical computations with an analytical treatment yielding compact expressions for chiral vector mode functions that reproduce the main spectral properties. We then develop a systematic formalism to evaluate the stochastic gravitational-wave background naturally induced at second order by these amplified fields, identifying both an intensity component and a circularly polarized contribution with characteristic frequency profiles. We discuss detection prospects with future multiband gravitational-wave observatories, showing that chiral signatures could provide a distinctive observational probe. Our results introduce new avenues for enhancing primordial magnetic fields and their associated gravitational-wave signals, opening promising possibilities for their future detection and interpretation, both with cosmological and gravitational wave probes.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在暴胀期间通过短暂的非慢滚阶段增强原初磁场的新机制，结合宇称破坏相互作用，首次在非慢滚框架中展示了手性效应能显著提升磁场振幅并产生独特的偏振依赖谱特征，同时系统研究了这些放大场自然诱导的随机引力波背景及其探测前景。
AI.motivation: 宇宙学矢量场在早期宇宙现象中至关重要，包括暴胀动力学、原初磁生成和暗物质场景。然而，构建既能产生宇宙学磁场又能避免强耦合、反作用和宇宙微波背景约束的模型仍然具有挑战性。需要寻找新的机制来增强原初磁场及其相关引力波信号。
AI.method: 研究了一种新颖机制：在暴胀期间通过短暂的非慢滚阶段在小尺度上放大原初磁场，同时保持理论一致性和观测可行性。在矢量场中引入宇称破坏相互作用，首次在非慢滚框架中展示手性效应能显著提升磁场振幅。通过详细数值计算和解析处理相结合，得到手性矢量模式函数的紧凑表达式。开发了系统形式主义来评估这些放大场在二阶自然诱导的随机引力波背景。
AI.result: 手性可以显著提升磁场振幅并产生独特的偏振依赖谱特征。解析处理得到的手性矢量模式函数能够重现主要谱特性。识别出随机引力波背景的强度分量和具有特征频率分布的圆偏振贡献。讨论了未来多波段引力波天文台的探测前景，表明手性特征可以提供独特的观测探针。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为增强原初磁场及其相关引力波信号开辟了新途径，为未来通过宇宙学和引力波探测手段进行检测和解释提供了有前景的可能性。手性特征可能成为区分不同暴胀机制和早期宇宙物理的重要观测信号。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙矢量场是许多早期宇宙现象的核心，包括暴胀动力学、原初磁生成和暗物质场景。然而，构建能够产生宇宙磁场同时避免强耦合、反作用和宇宙微波背景约束的模型仍然具有挑战性。我们研究了一种新机制，其中暴胀期间短暂的非慢滚阶段在小尺度上放大原初磁场，同时保持理论一致性和观测可行性。我们在矢量扇区中引入了宇称破坏相互作用，并首次在非慢滚框架中证明，手性可以显著增强磁场振幅并印刻出独特的偏振依赖谱特征。我们将详细的数值计算与解析处理相结合，得到了手性矢量模函数的紧凑表达式，这些表达式再现了主要的谱特性。然后，我们发展了一个系统化的形式体系来评估由这些放大场自然诱导的二阶随机引力波背景，识别出强度分量和具有特征频率轮廓的圆偏振贡献。我们讨论了未来多频段引力波观测站的探测前景，表明手性特征可以提供独特的观测探针。我们的结果为增强原初磁场及其相关引力波信号开辟了新途径，为未来通过宇宙学和引力波探测手段进行检测和解释提供了有前景的可能性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究为增强原初磁场及其相关引力波信号开辟了新途径，为未来通过宇宙学和引力波探测手段进行检测和解释提供了有前景的可能性。手性特征可能成为区分不同暴胀机制和早期宇宙物理的重要观测信号。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The magnetic power spectrum \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) (in terms of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) ) and the associated spectral index \(n_{B}\) arising from the three-phase model of \(J(N)\) are presented across variations of the parameters characterizing the intermediate phase, namely \(n_{2}\) and \(\Delta N_{2}\) . We compute them in the parity-preserving case of \(\gamma=0\) with a representative value of \(N_{1}=15\) (counted from the end of inflation). For reference, we mark the value of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) (in dashed black) in the plots of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) . We examine the spectrum and \(n_{B}\) over the range of scales where the spectrum rises towards the peak, and we inspect the behavior across across a range of large negative values of \(n_{2}=[-20,-26]\) (on top panels). For this analysis we set the intermediate phase of \(J\) to be brief yet finite with \(\Delta N_{2}=0.5\) . We find that the spectral index \(n_{B}\geq 5\) close to the peak. We also examine the spectrum and \(n_{B}\) across a range of \(\Delta N_{2}=[0,0.5]\) , setting \(n_{2}=-25\) (on bottom panels). Once again, \(n_{B}\) easily reaches values \(\geq 5\) for values of \(\Delta N_{2}\geq 0.4\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：展示了来自 \(J(N)\) 三相模型的磁功率谱 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\)（以 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) 表示）及相关谱指数 \(n_{B}\)，随表征中间相的参数 \(n_{2}\) 和 \(\Delta N_{2}\) 的变化。我们在宇称守恒情况 \(\gamma=0\) 下计算，取代表性值 \(N_{1}=15\)（从暴胀结束算起）。为参考，我们在 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) 图中标出了 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) 的值（黑色虚线）。我们检查了谱向峰值上升的尺度范围内的谱和 \(n_{B}\)，并观察了 \(n_{2}=[-20,-26]\) 大负值范围内的行为（顶部面板）。在此分析中，我们设定 \(J\) 的中间相短暂但有限，\(\Delta N_{2}=0.5\)。我们发现谱指数 \(n_{B}\geq 5\) 接近峰值。我们还检查了 \(\Delta N_{2}=[0,0.5]\) 范围内的谱和 \(n_{B}\)，设定 \(n_{2}=-25\)（底部面板）。再次，对于 \(\Delta N_{2}\geq 0.4\) 的值，\(n_{B}\) 很容易达到 \(\geq 5\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: We present \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2)\) and \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2)\) (on the left) and the total power spectrum \(\sum_{\lambda}\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}(k)/\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) (on the right) across a range of \(n_{2}=[-3,2]\) . For reference, we also plot the spectrum of the non-helical case without the intermediate phase of \(J\) where \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2\) (in dashed black). We have chosen \(\gamma=1\) , \(N_{1}=15\) and \(\Delta N_{2}=3\) in the functional form of \(J(N)\) . This choice of parameters lead to the wavenumber corresponding to the onset of the intermediate phase of \(J\) to be \(k_{1}=9.92\times 10^{13}\,{Mpc}^{-1}\) . For \(n_{2}=2\) , we obtain \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) and \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) to be scale-invariant but with a significant difference in magnitude due to non-zero \(\gamma\) . With the decrease in \(n_{2}\) , the features of dip, rise and peak become prominent in both the spectra. The total power spectrum (on the right) is predominantly right-circular but for a brief window of scales between the asymptotic values, where the power increases and turns left-circular in polarization with decrease in \(n_{2}\) . Hence, for \(n_{2}=-3\) with \(\Delta N_{2}=3\) , we obtain an interesting double-peaked spectrum with distinct polarization for each peak.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们展示了 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2)\) 和 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2)\)（左侧）以及总功率谱 \(\sum_{\lambda}\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}(k)/\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\)（右侧），范围覆盖 \(n_{2}=[-3,2]\)。为参考，我们还绘制了没有 \(J\) 中间相的非螺旋情况下的谱，其中 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2\)（黑色虚线）。我们在 \(J(N)\) 的函数形式中选择了 \(\gamma=1\)、\(N_{1}=15\) 和 \(\Delta N_{2}=3\)。这一参数选择导致对应于 \(J\) 中间相开始的波数为 \(k_{1}=9.92\times 10^{13}\,{Mpc}^{-1}\)。对于 \(n_{2}=2\)，我们得到 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) 和 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) 是尺度不变的，但由于非零 \(\gamma\) 而存在显著幅度差异。随着 \(n_{2}\) 的减小，两个谱中的凹陷、上升和峰值特征变得突出。总功率谱（右侧）主要是右旋的，但在渐近值之间的一个短暂尺度窗口内，随着 \(n_{2}\) 的减小，功率增加并转变为左旋偏振。因此，对于 \(n_{2}=-3\) 且 \(\Delta N_{2}=3\)，我们得到了一个有趣的双峰谱，每个峰值具有不同的偏振。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: We present \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) and \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) (on the left) and the total power spectrum \(\sum_{\lambda}\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}(k)\) (on the right) across a range of \(\Delta N_{2}=[0,3]\) , in terms of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) as in Fig. 2 . We also plot the reference spectrum of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2\) (in dashed black). We have chosen \(\gamma=1\) , \(N_{1}=15\) and \(n_{2}=-3\) in the functional form of \(J(N)\) . For \(\Delta N_{2}=0\) , we obtain \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) and \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) to be scale-invariant but with \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) dominating over \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) . With the increase in \(\Delta N_{2}\) , the features of dip, rise and peak become prominent in both the spectra. Around the peak of the spectra, \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) begins to dominate over \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) with increase in \(\Delta N_{2}\) . The total power spectrum (on the right) is predominantly right-circular but for the window of scales that is peaked and left-circular in polarization (as focussed in the inset).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：我们展示了 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) 和 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\)（左侧）以及总功率谱 \(\sum_{\lambda}\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}(k)\)（右侧），范围覆盖 \(\Delta N_{2}=[0,3]\)，以 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) 表示，如图2所示。我们还绘制了参考谱 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}=\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}/2\)（黑色虚线）。我们在 \(J(N)\) 的函数形式中选择了 \(\gamma=1\)、\(N_{1}=15\) 和 \(n_{2}=-3\)。对于 \(\Delta N_{2}=0\)，我们得到 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) 和 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) 是尺度不变的，但 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\) 占主导。随着 \(\Delta N_{2}\) 的增加，两个谱中的凹陷、上升和峰值特征变得突出。在谱的峰值附近，随着 \(\Delta N_{2}\) 的增加，\(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{L}(k)\) 开始主导 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{R}(k)\)。总功率谱（右侧）主要是右旋的，但在具有峰值和左旋偏振的尺度窗口内（如插图所示）除外。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: We present the magnetic power spectrum \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}(k)\) for a range of \(\gamma=[0,1]\) for individual helicities (on the left) and for the sum of both helicities (on the right) in terms of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) as in Figs. 2 and 3 . The parameters of the model are set to be \(N_{1}=15,n_{2}=-3,\,\Delta N_{2}=3\) . Evidently, for \(\gamma=0\) , we have both left and right helical modes having the same spectra. The inset on the right panel zooms in on the range of scales around the peak that shall be relevant for the behavior of the spectra of induced GW. Note that the case of \(\gamma=1\) generates an amplification of about \(10^{5}\) compared to the non-helical case of \(\gamma=0\) at the peak of the spectrum.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：我们展示了对于 \(\gamma=[0,1]\) 范围的磁功率谱 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}(k)\)，分别针对单个螺旋度（左侧）和两个螺旋度之和（右侧），以 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{0}\) 表示，如图2和3所示。模型参数设定为 \(N_{1}=15,n_{2}=-3,\,\Delta N_{2}=3\)。显然，对于 \(\gamma=0\)，左右螺旋模式具有相同的谱。右侧面板的插图放大了峰值附近的尺度范围，该范围与诱导引力波谱的行为相关。注意，与 \(\gamma=0\) 的非螺旋情况相比，\(\gamma=1\) 的情况在谱峰值处产生了约 \(10^{5}\) 的放大。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The total power spectrum \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)=\sum_{\lambda}\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}\) is presented in units of \(M_{{}_{{Pl}}}^{4}\) against the power spectrum of primary tensor perturbations \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{T}}}(k)\) , for a range of \(\gamma=[0,1]\) . We set the model parameters to be \(n_{2}=-3,\,N_{1}=15\) and \(\Delta N_{2}=3\) . The plot illustrates that the ratio of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{T}}}(k)M_{{}_{{Pl}}}^{4})\) is small even at the peak amplitude of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) . At the asymptotic value over small scales, this ratio is approximately \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{T}}}(k)M_{{}_{{Pl}}}^{4})\simeq f(\gamma)(H/M_{{}_{{Pl}}})^{2}\) , where \(f(\gamma)\) is typically \({\cal O}(10^{3})\) for \(\gamma=1\) . So, as long as \(H/M_{{}_{{Pl}}}\leq 10^{-3/2}\) , the backreaction due to electromagnetic energy density is small in the model of interest.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：总功率谱 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)=\sum_{\lambda}\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}^{\lambda}\) 以 \(M_{{}_{{Pl}}}^{4}\) 为单位呈现，与原始张量扰动功率谱 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{T}}}(k)\) 对比，范围覆盖 \(\gamma=[0,1]\)。我们设定模型参数为 \(n_{2}=-3,\,N_{1}=15\) 和 \(\Delta N_{2}=3\)。该图说明，即使在 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) 的峰值振幅处，比值 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{T}}}(k)M_{{}_{{Pl}}}^{4})\) 也很小。在小尺度的渐近值处，该比值约为 \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)/(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{T}}}(k)M_{{}_{{Pl}}}^{4})\simeq f(\gamma)(H/M_{{}_{{Pl}}})^{2}\)，其中 \(f(\gamma)\) 对于 \(\gamma=1\) 通常为 \({\cal O}(10^{3})\)。因此，只要 \(H/M_{{}_{{Pl}}}\leq 10^{-3/2}\)，在所关注的模型中，电磁能量密度引起的反作用很小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Analytical spectra evaluated with the limiting formula ( 4.32 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：使用极限公式 (4.32) 评估的解析谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The spectral density \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}\) and the associated V mode \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}^{V}\) are presented for a range of \(\gamma=[0,1]\) , corresponding to the magnetic spectra presented in Fig. 4 . For reference, we plot the sensitivity curves of LISA (the nominal form in cyan and for the broken-power law case in green) and ET (the nominal form in teal and for the power-law case in blue) [ 57 , 58 ] . We also demarcate the bound of \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}} [ 59 ] . Beyond the overall amplification of \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}\) due to non-zero \(\gamma\) , we find the spectrum having significant helicity as evidenced in \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}^{V}\) . The feature of altering helicity of \(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) induces corresponding feature of altering chirality around the peak of GW spectra as seen in \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}^{V}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：展示了对于 \(\gamma=[0,1]\) 范围的谱密度 \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}\) 及相关 V 模式 \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}^{V}\)，对应于图4中呈现的磁谱。为参考，我们绘制了 LISA（青色为标称形式，绿色为断裂幂律情况）和 ET（青色为标称形式，蓝色为幂律情况）的灵敏度曲线 [57, 58]。我们还标出了 \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}\) 的界限 [59]。除了由于非零 \(\gamma\) 导致的 \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}\) 整体放大外，我们发现谱具有显著螺旋性，如 \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}^{V}\) 所示。\(\mathcal{P}_{{}_{{B}}}(k)\) 的螺旋性改变特征在 \(\Omega_{{}_{{GW}}}^{V}\) 中表现为引力波谱峰值附近手性的相应改变特征。
